description: A shared mappa CIVILIZATION run: a deterministic coevolutionary agent-based civilization simulation on a mappa world. The whole run is a pure function of (world, config, civSeed, ticks) — this record IS the run; a reader regenerates the chronicle. `config` is the base64url civConfig token (agent + culture + seeding + climate); `world` identifies the mappa world (a seed or a com.minomobi.mappa.world token). The interestingness fields are a cached snapshot of the civ-signals battery for discovery/sorting; advisory, not authoritative (the reader can recompute).

world.description: The mappa world the civilization runs on: a seed (e.g. '7'), a 'seed:N' string, or a com.minomobi.mappa.world base64url token. Regenerated deterministically by the engine.

config.description: The civConfig, base64url-encoded. Continuous knobs are fixed-point ×1000. Holds three orthogonal blocks (agent / culture / seeding) plus a climate hook, popScale and keyframe interval.

civSeed.description: The civilization RNG seed. Selects one deterministic sample path; same (world, config, civSeed, ticks) ⇒ byte-identical chronicle, on any machine.

ticks.description: Number of tick steps to run (≈ 2.5 real years per tick by default; a full 10-millennia arc ≈ 4000 ticks).

title.description: An evocative name for the civilization.

descriptor.description: One-line auto-summary from civ-signals, e.g. 'A modern world over three separated homelands, 13 surviving cultures — two independent industrial takeoffs, a deep language phylogeny. ★88.'

score.description: Cached interestingness score (0–100) from civ-signals.js. Advisory; for sorting a discovery feed.

note.description: Optional human note from whoever published the run.
